title: senecio gossweileri
intro: Senecio gossweileri, also known as the Gossweiler's ragwort, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to Angola and other parts of southern Africa. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which have been shown to aid in the treatment of various health conditions. The health benefits of Senecio gossweileri include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting the immune system. Senecio gossweileri is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and it can also be used in tincture form to harness its medicinal properties.
